name: Campaign performance overview
prompt: Show me all active campaigns with their clicks and spend
expectations: Uses gads alias to run a GAQL query
Queries FROM campaign with campaign.status != 'REMOVED' filter
Selects metrics.clicks and metrics.cost_micros
Notes that cost_micros must be divided by 1,000,000 for currency

name: Cost micros conversion
prompt: What did we spend on Google Ads last month?
expectations: Queries metrics.cost_micros from campaign
Explicitly converts cost_micros to currency (divide by 1,000,000)
Uses a date range with segments.date with both >= and <= bounds

name: Conversion tracking audit
prompt: Check if our conversion tracking is set up correctly
expectations: Follows the 6-step conversion tracking audit procedure
Queries conversion_tracking_status from customer
Queries all conversion_action rows to check status and primary_for_goal
Queries campaign_conversion_goal and conversion_goal_campaign_config
Compares metrics.conversions vs metrics.all_conversions

name: Keyword performance
prompt: Which keywords are getting the most clicks?
expectations: Queries FROM keyword_view
Selects ad_group_criterion.keyword.text and ad_group_criterion.keyword.match_type
Includes metrics.clicks and metrics.impressions
Filters out removed campaigns

name: Date range metrics
expectations: Uses segments.date with both >= '2025-01-01' and <= '2025-01-31' bounds
Queries campaign metrics including impressions, clicks, cost_micros, conversions

name: Customer ID override
expectations: Uses --customer-id 1234567890 flag in the gads command
Does not require editing the config file

name: First-time setup guidance
prompt: How do I set up the Google Ads query tool?
expectations: Instructs to run setup.sh to create the virtual environment
Explains google-ads.yaml config file creation with developer_token and customer_id
Shows both service account and OAuth2 config templates
Provides test command: gads "SELECT customer.id FROM customer"

name: Enum interpretation
expectations: Identifies code 13 as PERFORMANCE_MAX from the enum reference
Notes that the query script returns names not codes, so raw codes only appear in edge cases

name: Search terms report
prompt: What search terms triggered our ads this week?
expectations: Queries FROM search_term_view
Selects search_term_view.search_term with metrics
Applies a date range filter using segments.date

name: Troubleshooting a failing query
prompt: My query with campaign.start_date is failing
expectations: Identifies campaign.start_date as a potentially problematic field
Advises removing suspected fields one at a time to isolate the issue
Does not suggest workarounds that bypass the API

name: Manager account query
prompt: How do I query a sub-account under my manager account?
expectations: Explains login_customer_id in google-ads.yaml for manager accounts
Explains --customer-id flag to target the specific sub-account

name: Ad group CPC bids
prompt: Show me all ad groups and their CPC bids
expectations: Queries FROM ad_group
Selects ad_group.cpc_bid_micros
Notes that bid_micros must be divided by 1,000,000 for currency conversion
